sentences.arabic: كَانَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ يُوسُفُ يَخَافُ مِنَ الظَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Jusuf koji se bojao tame.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Yusuf who was afraid of the dark.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ لَا يَنَامُ بِدُونِ إِضَاءَةٍ فِي غُرْفَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nije mogao zaspati bez svjetla u sobi.
sentences.translationEn: He could not sleep without a light in his room.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى لَهُ أَبُوهُ مِصْبَاحًا صَغِيرًا بِشَكْلِ نَجْمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je kupio malu lampu u obliku zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: His father bought him a small lamp in the shape of a star.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ يُوسُفُ بِهُدُوءٍ وَهُوَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى الضَّوْءِ الأَصْفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je mirno zaspao gledajući u žutu svjetlost.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf fell asleep peacefully while looking at the yellow light.
